\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4471 introduces Pressure Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\iiint_{V_O} \left( \nabla \mathcal{P}_M + \mathbf{f}_{\text{ext}} \right) dV = 0 \iff \mathbf{a}^\mu = 0$$
